description:
Under `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → Practical backlog summary Tier 2 current-task lifecycle.

Clarify the rules for when `currentTask` and `suggestedResponse` should be replaced, merged, preserved, or cleared so turn-to-turn task continuity becomes more disciplined and predictable.
title: Define replace, merge, and clear semantics for currentTask and suggestedResponse
